security-stateless-sessions.description: All HTTP sessions are stateless (no server-side session state). Every request carries all needed context via JWT or API key.

security-cors-policy.description: Cross-Origin Resource Sharing restricted to allowed origins. Prevents unauthorized browser-based API access.

security-csrf-disabled.description: CSRF protection disabled for stateless REST API. Safe because no cookie-based sessions are used — all auth is via bearer tokens.

implementation.justification: Stateless JWT auth — no cookies, no session, no CSRF risk

security-rate-limiting.description: Rate limiting to prevent API abuse. Configurable requests-per-second and burst size.

implementation.note: Disabled in local dev; enable in production via env var

security-input-validation.description: All API inputs validated via Jakarta Bean Validation annotations (@Valid, @NotNull, @NotBlank, @Size, @Positive) on DTO records.

implementation.pattern: DTO records with @Valid in controller parameters

security-structured-error-responses.description: All exceptions mapped to structured JSON error responses via GlobalExceptionHandler. No stack traces leaked to clients.

implementation.response-format: ErrorResponse record with status, message, timestamp, traceId
